body_transformation: The wings now feature molten gold feather edges with crimson ember patterns tracing their veins, while the curled tail tip glows with a molten core, casting faint smoke trails. The beige body transforms into cracked obsidian scales with molten gold lava cracks, and the pointed ears gain subtle heat-haze distortion at their tips. The short stubby legs are encased in ember-scaled armor plating, and the rounded head retains its shape but now has a faint amber glow beneath its feathers. Small glowing embers dot the wing joints, adding dynamic motion to the static silhouette.
signature_feature: Tail tip: molten gold core with glowing crimson fissures and smoke trails.
